description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof profile. The structure is composed of two main rectangular volumes, one larger and one smaller, connected by a central open area that appears to serve as a courtyard or patio. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete or stucco and large glass panels, providing a sleek and contemporary appearance. A prominent swimming pool is integrated into the outdoor space, adjacent to the main living area. The house includes expansive windows and sliding doors, maximizing natural light and offering seamless indoor-outdoor living. The overall layout emphasizes horizontal lines and open spaces, characteristic of modern residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with minimalist lines, large glass panels, and an integrated swimming pool. The design features open spaces and a sleek, contemporary exterior.
description_view_0: From this side, the house's elongated layout, flat roofs, and the adjacent swimming pool are clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main entry area and the relationship between the two main building volumes, with the pool set to the left.
description_view_2: The rear of the house shows the long, continuous roofline and the open courtyard area, with the pool visible in the background.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes the pool and the smaller building volume, with the main living area set further back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a minimalist door with a flat overhang, no steps, and a clean, open approach.
